meaning: n.善意地取笑,逗弄v.善意的与人开玩笑
examples: He enjoyed exchanging banter with the customers.
As she closed the door, she heard Tom exchanging good-natured banter with Jane.
This episode might make for jolly cocktail-party banter next time he is in Beijing.
Outside, a group of women banter with the waiter as he refills their glasses with red wine.
But the friendly banter stopped when Ditiro spotted something unusual: a couple of vultures in a nearby tree.
